'''√t-th-j''' ('''tathaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pegboard|pegboard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-th-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pegboard|pegboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √t-th-j
|-
! Lemma
| tathaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tathajithi|tathajithi]] || [[word:tathajiji|tathajiji]] || [[word:tathajishi|tathajishi]] || [[word:tathaji|tathaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tathajuthuth|tathajuthuth]] || [[word:tathajujuj|tathajujuj]] || [[word:tathajushush|tathajushush]] || [[word:tathaj|tathaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tathajuthu|tathajuthu]] || [[word:tathajuju|tathajuju]] || [[word:tathajushu|tathajushu]] || [[word:tathaju|tathaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tathajufuth|tathajufuth]] || [[word:tathajufuj|tathajufuj]] || [[word:tathajufush|tathajufush]] || [[word:tathajuf|tathajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tathajethe|tathajethe]] || [[word:tathajeje|tathajeje]] || [[word:tathajeshe|tathajeshe]] || [[word:tathaje|tathaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tathajothoth|tathajothoth]] || [[word:tathajojoj|tathajojoj]] || [[word:tathajoshosh|tathajoshosh]] || [[word:tathaj|tathaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tathajotho|tathajotho]] || [[word:tathajojo|tathajojo]] || [[word:tathajosho|tathajosho]] || [[word:tathajo|tathajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tathajofoth|tathajofoth]] || [[word:tathajofoj|tathajofoj]] || [[word:tathajofosh|tathajofosh]] || [[word:tathajof|tathajof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tathajïf|tathajïf]] || [[word:tathajïf|tathajïf]] || [[word:tathajïf|tathajïf]] || [[word:tathajïf|tathajïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tathajïfïf|tathajïfïf]] || [[word:tathajïfïf|tathajïfïf]] || [[word:tathajïfïf|tathajïfïf]] || [[word:tathajïfïf|tathajïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tathajïf|tathajïf]] || [[word:tathajïf|tathajïf]] || [[word:tathajïf|tathajïf]] || [[word:tathajïf|tathajïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tathajïf|tathajïf]] || [[word:tathajïf|tathajïf]] || [[word:tathajïf|tathajïf]] || [[word:tathajïf|tathajïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tathajæthæ|tathajæthæ]] || [[word:tathajæjæ|tathajæjæ]] || [[word:tathajæshæ|tathajæshæ]] || [[word:tathajæ|tathajæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tathajathath|tathajathath]] || [[word:tathajajaj|tathajajaj]] || [[word:tathajashash|tathajashash]] || [[word:tathaj|tathaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tathajatha|tathajatha]] || [[word:tathajaja|tathajaja]] || [[word:tathajasha|tathajasha]] || [[word:tathaja|tathaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tathajafath|tathajafath]] || [[word:tathajafaj|tathajafaj]] || [[word:tathajafash|tathajafash]] || [[word:tathajaf|tathajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:tathajasha|tathajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gotathajasha|gotathajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokitathajasha|gokitathajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:tathajnüsha|tathajnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gotathajnknüsha|gotathajnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokitathajnüsha|gokitathajnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tathajshësha|tathajshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotathajnkshësha|gotathajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitathajshësha|gokitathajshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tathajrosha|tathajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotathajnkrosha|gotathajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitathajrosha|gokitathajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tathajmusha|tathajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gotathajnkmusha|gotathajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitathajmusha|gokitathajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:tathajsherasha|tathajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gotathajnksherasha|gotathajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokitathajsherasha|gokitathajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:tathajngasha|tathajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gotathajnkngasha|gotathajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokitathajngasha|gokitathajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tathajyasha|tathajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gotathajnkyasha|gotathajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokitathajyasha|gokitathajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:tathajyamasha|tathajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gotathajnkyamasha|gotathajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokitathajyamasha|gokitathajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:tathajnüshësha|tathajnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotathajnknüshësha|gotathajnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitathajnüshësha|gokitathajnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tathajnürosha|tathajnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotathajnknürosha|gotathajnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitathajnürosha|gokitathajnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tathajnümusha|tathajnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotathajnknümusha|gotathajnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitathajnümusha|gokitathajnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:tathajshënüsha|tathajshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotathajnkshënüsha|gotathajnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitathajshënüsha|gokitathajshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tathajshërosha|tathajshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotathajnkshërosha|gotathajnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitathajshërosha|gokitathajshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tathajshëmusha|tathajshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotathajnkshëmusha|gotathajnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitathajshëmusha|gokitathajshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:tathajronüsha|tathajronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotathajnkronüsha|gotathajnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitathajronüsha|gokitathajronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:tathajroshësha|tathajroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotathajnkroshësha|gotathajnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitathajroshësha|gokitathajroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tathajromusha|tathajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotathajnkromusha|gotathajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitathajromusha|gokitathajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:tathajmunüsha|tathajmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotathajnkmunüsha|gotathajnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitathajmunüsha|gokitathajmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:tathajmushësha|tathajmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotathajnkmushësha|gotathajnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitathajmushësha|gokitathajmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tathajmurosha|tathajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotathajnkmurosha|gotathajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitathajmurosha|gokitathajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:tathaj|tathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:tæthæj|tæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hotathaj|hotathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hotæthæj|hotæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotathaj|hohotathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotæthæj|hohotæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nütathaj|nütathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nütæthæj|nütæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünütathaj|nünütathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünütæthæj|nünütæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïtathaj|nïtathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïtæthæj|nïtæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïtathaj|nïnïtathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïtæthæj|nïnïtæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lutathaj|lutathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lutæthæj|lutæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutathaj|lulutathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutæthæj|lulutæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:litathaj|litathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:litæthæj|litæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitathaj|lilitathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitæthæj|lilitæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kotathaj|kotathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kotæthæj|kotæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotathaj|kokotathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotæthæj|kokotæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ketathaj|ketathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ketæthæj|ketæthæj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketathaj|keketathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketæthæj|keketæthæj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
